summary: Dow fell 280.12 pts (-0.57%) to 48,861. S&P 500 down 0.04% to 7,135. Nasdaq up 0.04% to 24,673. Fed held rates. Oil prices up on Iran blockade reports. Big Tech earnings awaited.
